name: Clinton Hot Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cooked rice in chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the chicken, celery, and rice as per their respective recipes.
2. In a large bowl, combine the cream of chicken soup, mayonnaise, chopped onion, lemon juice, and chopped eggs. Mix well.
3. Add the cooked chicken, celery, and rice to the bowl, mixing thoroughly.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Pour the melted butter over the mixture in the bowl.
6. Sprinkle the slivered almonds and crushed cornflakes evenly on top of the salad.
7. Transfer the salad to a casserole dish and bake for 45 minutes, or until heated through and lightly browned on top.
